name: Data Encryption Enforcement
description: Detects unencrypted sensitive data and enforces encryption policies. Riggs AI analyzes alerts from DLP and endpoint monitoring systems to identify sensitive data stored without proper encryption (at-rest or in-transit). Confirmed violations trigger automated encryption application where possible, a remediation ticket for manual encryption cases, and compliance team notification. Tracks encryption compliance across the organization.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create remediation tickets for encryption enforcement actions

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify compliance team and resource owners of encryption violations

data.title: Encryption Violation Alert
data.summary: Triggers on alerts for unencrypted sensitive data detected by DLP or endpoint monitoring

data.title: AI Encryption Gap Analysis
data.summary: Riggs AI analyzes the unencrypted data to classify sensitivity and determine encryption requirements

config.custom_instructions: Identify the type of encryption violation (at-rest, in-transit, or both). Classify data sensitivity and applicable compliance requirements (PCI-DSS, HIPAA, GDPR). Determine if automated encryption can be applied or if manual remediation is needed.

data.title: Encryption Required?
data.summary: Branch based on whether the data requires encryption per policy

data.title: Auto-Encryption Possible?
data.summary: Check if encryption can be applied automatically or requires manual action

data.title: Apply Encryption
data.summary: Automatically apply encryption to the unencrypted sensitive data

params.reason: Encryption enforcement — sensitive data found unencrypted

data.title: Update Status: Encrypted
data.summary: Mark the resource as encrypted and update compliance tracking

config.note: Encryption automatically applied to {{$.trigger.alert.resource_name}}. Algorithm: AES-256. Compliance requirement: {{$.nodes.enc-2.result.compliance_framework}}.

data.title: Create Manual Encryption Ticket
data.summary: Create a Jira ticket for manual encryption remediation by the resource owner

config.title: Encryption Required: {{$.trigger.alert.resource_name}} — {{$.nodes.enc-2.result.encryption_type}}

data.title: Notify Compliance Team
data.summary: Alert compliance team about the encryption violation and remediation status

data.title: Close Alert — Properly Encrypted
data.summary: Data is properly encrypted or non-sensitive, close alert

config.note: Encryption violation alert reviewed by Riggs AI. Data is either properly encrypted, exempt from encryption requirements, or classified as non-sensitive. Verdict: {{$.nodes.enc-2.result.verdict}}. Closing alert.

config.summary: Data encryption enforcement and remediation completed
